LoginPage.description: Sign in with Google to continue.
LoginPage.terms_link: you accept the Terms of Service.
LoginPage.toast_success: You have successfully signed in. Redirecting...
LoginPage.toast_error_description: Could not sign in with Google.

OnboardingPage.description: Select your photography interests so we can provide you with the most suitable experience.
OnboardingPage.analysis_subtitle: Luma needs to get to know you to coach you best.

device_type.text: What device do you use to take photos?

interest.text: What do you photograph the most?

approach.text: What do you pay the most attention to when taking photos?

AcademyPage.main_description: Take your photography knowledge from basic to mastery.
AcademyPage.level_basic_description: Learn the fundamentals of your camera, understand exposure, and master the basic composition rules.
AcademyPage.level_intermediate_description: Shoot in different genres, apply advanced techniques, and consciously control light.
AcademyPage.level_advanced_description: Create your own artistic style, learn professional lighting setups, and specialize in photography.
AcademyPage.tooltip_intermediate: Intermediate Level — Keep progressing, the lock opens.
AcademyPage.tooltip_advanced: Expert content for Advanced Level. Keep progressing to unlock it.
AcademyPage.journey_desc: Each level is specifically designed for you to specialize in photography. Earn XP by completing lessons and rank up.

AcademyLevelPage.practice_submission_description: Upload the photo you took for this assignment and get instant feedback.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_file_size_description: Please upload an image file smaller than 10MB.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_analysis_start_description: Preparing feedback tailored to your assignment.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_upload_fail_description: Your photo could not be stored. Please try again.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_feedback_ready_description: You can see the result below.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_analysis_fail_description: An error occurred while creating AI feedback.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_reward_description: You earned {xp} XP and {auro} Auro from this lesson.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! You can now mentor as a Vexer.
AcademyLevelPage.invalid_level_description: The training level you are looking for was not found.
AcademyLevelPage.no_lessons_title: No Lessons Available at This Level Yet
AcademyLevelPage.no_lessons_description: Create lessons belonging to this level through the admin tool from your profile page.

CompetitionsPage.title: Competitions
CompetitionsPage.coming_soon_description: General competitions organized by Viewora will be showcased in this area.
CompetitionsPage.no_competitions_description: New competitions will be here soon. Stay tuned!

DashboardPage.main_title: I am Luma. I am accompanying you on your photography journey.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_1: We will improve your photos together.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_2: I analyze lighting, composition, and technical details. I highlight your strengths and clearly point out your weaknesses.
DashboardPage.greeting_cta: Hello {name}. If you're ready, upload your first photo.
DashboardPage.upload_prompt_main: Click to upload or drag and drop
DashboardPage.toast_invalid_file_description: Please upload an image file (e.g., JPG, PNG).
DashboardPage.toast_upload_only_description: Your photo has been added to your gallery. You can analyze it anytime.
DashboardPage.toast_upload_fail_description: Your photo could not be stored. Please check your Firebase Storage rules.
DashboardPage.toast_db_fail_description: Your photo could not be saved to the database. Please try again.
DashboardPage.toast_analysis_fail_description: AI analysis failed. Your photo has been added to your gallery, you can try again from there.
DashboardPage.toast_xp_gain_description: You earned {xp} XP for the analysis.
DashboardPage.toast_bonus_description: You earned +{xp} bonus XP for high score!
DashboardPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! You can now mentor as a Vexer.
DashboardPage.state_wait: This process may take some time, please wait.
DashboardPage.no_strengths: No specific strong point was found in this photo, but it is generally a balanced shot.

ExplorePage.title: Exhibition Hall
ExplorePage.description: Explore exhibitions, competitions and photography communities.
ExplorePage.loading_analysis: Loading detailed AI analysis for this photo...
ExplorePage.no_photos_title: No one has shared their work yet.
ExplorePage.no_photos_description: Revitalize this space by submitting a photo from your own gallery to the Exhibition!
ExplorePage.category_competitions_desc: Compete with your photos and win prizes.
ExplorePage.category_groups_desc: Join photography communities and get feedback.

GalleryPage.title: My Gallery
GalleryPage.toast_foyer_limit_reached: Foyer limit (10 photos) has been reached.
GalleryPage.toast_error_foyer: An error occurred during the foyer operation.
GalleryPage.camera_info_ai: This image was generated by AI
GalleryPage.camera_info_unknown: Camera Type Could Not Be Determined
GalleryPage.toast_delete_complete: Your photo has been permanently deleted from the gallery.
GalleryPage.toast_error_delete: Delete operation could not be completed.
GalleryPage.alert_dialog_delete_description: This photo will be permanently deleted from both your gallery and the Exhibition (if added). This action cannot be undone.
GalleryPage.no_photos_filtered_title: No photos found matching this filter.
GalleryPage.no_photos_filtered_description: Select a different tag, or use the "All" filter to see all your photos.
GalleryPage.no_photos_title: No Photos in Your Gallery Yet
GalleryPage.no_photos_description: Fill the gallery by doing your first analysis with the AI coach!
GalleryPage.toast_submit_exhibition_complete: Your photo has been submitted to the Exhibition.
GalleryPage.toast_withdraw_exhibition_complete: Your photo has been withdrawn from the Exhibition.
GalleryPage.toast_error_exhibition: An error occurred during the exhibition operation.
GalleryPage.alert_dialog_withdraw_description: This photo will be removed from the public Exhibition. It will continue to be visible in your gallery.
GalleryPage.dialog_not_analyzed_desc: This photo was only uploaded, not scanned by AI.
GalleryPage.empty_gallery_desc: No photos found matching this filter yet.

GroupsPage.title: My Groups
GroupsPage.create_limit_tooltip: You have reached the group creation limit ({ownedCount}/{limit}).
GroupsPage.create_dialog_description: Start your community by giving your group a name and purpose.
GroupsPage.form_error_name_min: Group name must be at least 3 characters.
GroupsPage.form_error_name_max: Group name can be at most 50 characters.
GroupsPage.form_placeholder_description: Short information about the group's purpose, goals, or rules.
GroupsPage.toast_create_error_description: There was an error while creating the group.
GroupsPage.join_dialog_description: Enter the 6-digit invitation code for the group you want to join.
GroupsPage.form_error_code_format: Code must consist of only 6 digits.
GroupsPage.toast_join_not_found_description: No group found with this code. Check the code.
GroupsPage.toast_join_already_member_description: You are already a member of the '{name}' group. Redirecting.
GroupsPage.toast_join_fail_description: You could not join the group. The group may be full or an error occurred.
GroupsPage.card_owner_tooltip: You are the owner of this group.
GroupsPage.no_groups_title: Not a Member of Any Group Yet
GroupsPage.no_groups_description: Start your own community by creating a new group or get an invitation from a friend.
GroupsPage.create_tooltip_no_access: Reach Viewner level to create a group.
GroupsPage.no_description: No description available for this group.

GroupDetailPage.invite_member_description: Enter the email address of the user you want to invite to the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_group_full_description: This group can have at most {maxMembers} members.
GroupDetailPage.toast_user_not_found_description: There is no user with this email.
GroupDetailPage.toast_already_member_description: This user is already a member of the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_member_added_description: {email} has been successfully added to the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_invite_sent_description: A group invitation has been sent to {email}.
GroupDetailPage.toast_add_member_no_permission: You do not have permission to add members.
GroupDetailPage.toast_add_member_generic_error: An issue occurred while inviting the member.
GroupDetailPage.group_not_found_error: An error occurred while loading this group.
GroupDetailPage.group_not_found_no_permission: This group does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
GroupDetailPage.invite_dialog_description: You can invite new members to your group using this QR code, link, or 6-digit code.
GroupDetailPage.wip_placeholder: Group-specific exhibition and assignment area will be here soon.
GroupDetailPage.remove_dialog_title: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
GroupDetailPage.remove_dialog_description: {memberName} will be permanently removed from the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_remove_success: {memberName} has been removed from the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_remove_error: An error occurred while removing the member.
GroupDetailPage.delete_group_description: This action is irreversible. The group and all its content will be permanently deleted.
GroupDetailPage.delete_group_dialog_title: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
GroupDetailPage.delete_group_dialog_description: This action will permanently delete the group and all associated data.
GroupDetailPage.toast_delete_error: An error occurred while deleting the group.
GroupDetailPage.competitions_no_competitions_description: The group owner can create a new competition from this tab.
GroupDetailPage.create_competition_dialog_description: Set up a new competition for your group members.
GroupDetailPage.form_placeholder_comp_description: A brief about the competition's rules and goal.
GroupDetailPage.form_error_date: End date must be after start date.
GroupDetailPage.toast_comp_create_error: An error occurred while creating the competition.
GroupDetailPage.assignment_success_description: Your work has been successfully recorded by the system.

LumaMentorPage.title: Luma Mentor
LumaMentorPage.subtitle: I will prepare a strategic roadmap to take your vision to mastery.
LumaMentorPage.start_card_desc: Luma is ready to scan your photos and prepare a custom strategy for you.
LumaMentorPage.toast_no_access_desc: Vexer level and Master package are required for strategic analysis.
LumaMentorPage.toast_data_insufficient_desc: Luma needs at least 3 analyzed photos to study your progress.
LumaMentorPage.toast_error_desc: Luma is unable to respond at the moment.

PricingPage.page_description: Purchase Auro to take your skills to the next level and unlock your artistic vision.
PricingPage.toast_redirecting_description: This is a simulation. In a real application, you would be redirected to iyzico.
PricingPage.toast_purchase_success_description: {auro} Auro has been added to your account.
PricingPage.beta_alert_desc: Viewora is currently in access (beta) stage. All analysis features are free to use right now.
PricingPage.beta_info_desc: During the beta period, you can use the Pix automatically defined in your account. The actual payment infrastructure will be activated with the launch.

ProfilePage.admin_revenue_report_description: Sum of completed purchases from all users.
ProfilePage.admin_toast_report_error_description: An error occurred while fetching revenue report data. Admin permission is required for this feature.
ProfilePage.admin_tools_description: Perform administrative tasks for the application here.
ProfilePage.admin_generate_lessons_description: Have the AI create 5 new lessons for your chosen category.
ProfilePage.admin_strategic_feedback_description: Test the new coaching prompt using test_user_1.json data.
ProfilePage.admin_toast_missing_selection_descriptio: Please select a level and a category to generate lessons.

ProfilePage.admin_toast_generate_error_description: An issue occurred while generating or saving lessons.
ProfilePage.toast_restore_complete_description: Your existing purchases have been synchronized with your account.
ProfilePage.admin_total_users_description: Total number of users registered in the system.
ProfilePage.admin_edit_exhibition_description: Manage photos in the public exhibition hall.
ProfilePage.developer_tools_description: Change your user level for testing purposes.
